full_text:
Xu Xiang (Ziming) 徐詳 (子明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Xiang (徐詳), styledZiming (子明). A personal aide to Sun Quan, he negotiated Wu’s surrender to Cao Cao. Looked after army supplies. Xu Xiang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
